purpose: Test whether model width is an active bottleneck for the intended causal six-M4 trajectory task without changing the data or probability contract.

staged_execution.stage_0: Static count, contract, and mode identity; no CUDA.
staged_execution.stage_1: Two real T4x2 optimizer updates per capacity; stop on OOM, nonfinite loss/gradient, scaler skip, missing gradient, or Adam-state drift.
staged_execution.stage_2: Run all six fixed 500-step trajectories only if both capacities pass stage_1.
staged_execution.stage_3: Re-open all per-anchor rows and calculate the predeclared paired decision outside the hosted process.

primary_estimand.pairing: same subject, same anchors, same seed
primary_estimand.seed_aggregation: mean within subject across the three paired seeds

capacity_bottleneck_supported: upper endpoint of the paired subject-bootstrap 95% interval is below zero
candidate_48m has lower subject-macro NLL in at least two of three seeds
all candidate runs complete with no OOM, nonfinite value, scaler skip, missing gradient, or optimizer-state violation
capacity_bottleneck_not_supported: lower endpoint of the paired subject-bootstrap 95% interval is at or above zero

secondary_reports: step-0/100/250/500 subject-macro joint NLL learning curves
prohibitions: No block-mode result may choose the trajectory model size.
No wall-time-normalized training budget may replace the fixed anchor-exposure budget.
No test split may be read.
No post-hoc subject, seed, step, likelihood-family, or learning-rate selection is allowed.
The diagnostic cannot authorize a formal run by itself.
